title: How to Set Up and Use SpaceBot (Better Than OpenClaw?)
summary: SpaceBot is an open-source framework designed for deploying AI agents across community platforms including Discord, Telegram, Slack, Twitch, and WebChat. The video demonstrates setup via Docker, model routing for token efficiency, integration with APIs like Apify, and the framework's UI features for memories, cron jobs, and identity configuration.
